---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a frustration?

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Academic Context
If this relates to a specific epigraphy workflow, publication, or dataset, please describe it here. This helps us prioritize features that serve real research needs.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
